generated_oml:
instance InputCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical sensor measuring input current for MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataStream
]

instance OutputAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical sensor measuring output angle for MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataStream
]

instance SensorDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InputCurrentSensor, OutputAngleSensor
]

instance OutputTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Output torque computed from input current and angle via dynamics model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEnabler, VisualizationEnabler
]

instance DynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamics model for computing output torque from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEnabler
]

instance WhiteBoxFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEnabler
]

instance BlackBoxFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Black-box model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEnabler
]

instance FrictionIdentificationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler integrating white-box and black-box models for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler providing integrated visualization capabilities for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous, multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models to enhance motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization capabilities within a unified dashboard for real-time monitoring and analysis of the physical system"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Joint friction identification for motion accuracy improvement"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring and analysis of physical system via unified dashboard"
]

instance MABIMAX100Robot : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Serial robot MABI MAX 100 with six axes, first axis driven by permanent magnet synchronous motor with gear transmission followed by cycloidal gear, controlled by Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller for robot control"
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gear transmission in first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance CycloidalGear : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gear in first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance RobotEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MABIMAX100Robot, SiemensSINUMERIK840DController, PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGear
]

instance ACMEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACME Architecture Description Language for component & connector modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance AADLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL Architecture Description Language for component & connector modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

    base:desc "MontiArc Architecture Description Language for component & connector modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance MontiArcAutomatonEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService

    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle includes development phases characterized by hierarchical abstraction levels (requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, product/technical layer) as defined in Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE), transitioning to operational phases where the DT actively processes physical system data. Lifecycle governance integrates heterogeneous stakeholders through methodologies like RFLP, OOSEM, SPES, and SMArDT."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for streaming sensor data between physical and digital components; network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability mechanisms, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with industry standards including SysML [17], ACME [23], AADL [24], and MontiArc [25, 26] for architecture description and systems engineering modeling, facilitating component & connector perspectives and interoperability across heterogeneous modeling tools and stakeholders."
]
